zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.NewCastle, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Bradford於1276年出生在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Alexander de Bradford30歲，母親Elena27歲。他於1313年與Anabilla在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Bradford于1276年出生在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Alexander de Bradford30岁，母亲Elena27岁。他于1313年与Anabilla在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places, large and small, called Bradford; in particular the city in Yorkshire, which originally rose to prosperity as a wool town. There are others in Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Greater Manchester, Norfolk, Somerset, Cheshire, Wiltshire and elsewhere. They are all named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + ford ‘ford’.

History: This name was brought independently to North American by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Bradford (1590–1657), born in Austerfield in South Yorkshire, England, the son of a yeoman farmer, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who emigrated to North America on the Mayflower in 1620. He was a signer of the Mayflower Compact and in 1621 he was elected governor of Plymouth colony, being re-elected thirty times. Another William Bradford (1663–1752), printer, came from Barnwell, Leicestershire, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in 1685, subsequently moving to New York, where he set up a printing press and founded a paper mill. His grandson, also called William Bradford (1721–91), was known as ‘the patriot printer’, famous for his Philadelphia newspaper, which among other things denounced the Stamp Act, "which no American can mention without abhorrence".

variants.name: Braford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Brafford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Bradford was born in 1276, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander de Bradford, was 30 and his mother, Elena, was 27. He married Anabilla in 1313, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1318, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Bradfordが1276年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Alexander de Bradfordは30歳，母Elenaは27歳であった。1313年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインでAnabillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Bradford(이)가 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Bradford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Anabilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Bradford родился в 1276 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander de Bradford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anabilla в 1313 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1318 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.
